inputs.titre: Théorie générale de l'emploi, de l'intérêt et de la monnaie

reason: The image depicts a man in a suit and fedora at a desk, writing. The scene includes period-appropriate items like an inkwell, paper, books, and a desk lamp. The gothic style windows and bookshelves also suit the intended era. The lighting and overall atmosphere are consistent with early 20th-century photography. It is not a perfect match to the description (e.g. this is a color photo), but the essentials are there.
